response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Senior/Staff Software Engineer with deep technical expertise in distributed systems and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but he lacks the requisite executive leadership experience. The CTO role requires a track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ and architecting high-stakes fintech AI systems, whereas Bogdan's background consists almost entirely of Individual Contributor roles without high-level organizational management.
strengths: Strong background in backend and distributed systems, including microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive as the founder of an open-source event-driven platform (GISCollective).
concerns: Lacks executive or senior technical leadership experience (e.g., Director, VP, or CTO); entirely IC-focused resume.
No demonstrated experience scaling engineering organizations or managing external delivery partners.
Lacks deep domain expertise in algorithmic working-capital allocation and real-time credit risk assessment.
